field.value: Fragment from the Res Gestae Inscription
Fragment from the Res Gestae Divi Augusti inscription at Monumentum Ancyranum.

[PLEBI.CVM.CONSVLE.Q.LVCRET]IO.ETPRINCI[P]IBVS[.VIRIS.OB]VIAM.MIHI. / MIS[S]A[.]E[ST.IN.CAMPANI]A[M.QVI.]HONOS.[AD H]O[C.TEMPVS.]NEMINI.PRAE / TER[.M]E.ES[T.DECRETVS.CVM.]EX[HISP]ANIA.GAL[LIAQVE.REBVS.IN EIS.]PROVINCIIS PROSPE / RE[.GESTIS.ROMAM.REDI.]TI[.]N[ER]ONE[.]P.QVI[NTILIO.CONSVLIBVS ARAM / [PACIS.A]V[G]VST[AE.SENATVS.PRO.]REDOTV.MEO.CO[NSACRANDVM.CENSVIT.]AD CAM / [PVM.MARTIVM.IN.QVA.M]AGISTRATVS.ET.SAC[ERDOTES.ET.VIRGINES.]V[EST]ALES / [ANNIVERSARIVM.SACRIFIC]IVM FACER[E.DECREVIT. / [IANVM.]QVIRIN[VM.QVEM.OMNINO.CL]AVSSVM ESS[E.MAIORES NOSTRI.VOLVERV]NT / [CVM.]PER TOTVM.I[MPERIVM.PO]PVLI ROMAN[I.TERRA.MARIQVE ES]SE[T.]PARTA.VIC / [TORII]S.PAX.CVM.PRI[VSQVAM].NASCERER.A[.CONDITA.VRBE.B]IS.OMNINO.CLAVSVM / [F]VISSE.PRODATVR.M[EMORI]AE.TER.ME.PRIN[CIPE.SENATVS.]CL[AV]DENDVM.ESSE.CE[N]SVIT / [FIL]IOS.MEOS.QVOS.IVV[ENES.M]IHI.ERIPVIT.FOR[TVNA.G]AIVM.ET.LVCIVM.CAES[AR]ES
